full_text:
Taishi Xiang (Yuanfu) 太史享 (元復)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Taishi Xiang (太史享), styledYuanfu (元復), was born in Donglai. Held various posts in Wu. In novel, looked after by Quan after Ci’s death. Taishi Xiang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
